task.goal: Control the half-cheetah robot so it runs forward quickly and efficiently.
task.success_condition: A successful episode reaches a total score of at least 5000 over the 1000 step episode.
task.reward_description: The environment rewards forward velocity and subtracts control cost. Higher total return is better.
notes: This is a MuJoCo locomotion task with six continuous torque actions.
The observation excludes absolute x position and includes body pose and joint velocities.
Good policies usually require coordinated periodic motion.

minimum_score.reason: Policy errors, invalid actions, evaluator failures, and workspace contract violations receive a conservative low score.

action_meanings.name: back_thigh_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the back thigh joint in [-1, 1].

action_meanings.name: back_shin_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the back shin joint in [-1, 1].

action_meanings.name: back_foot_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the back foot joint in [-1, 1].

action_meanings.name: front_thigh_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the front thigh joint in [-1, 1].

action_meanings.name: front_shin_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the front shin joint in [-1, 1].

action_meanings.name: front_foot_torque
action_meanings.meaning: Torque applied to the front foot joint in [-1, 1].
